preview_maps.description: 8×8 puzzle board with 12 tile types in s0 (褪色枯岛) saturation
5 special blocks row with idle frame and two animation frames each
tile_tuna across all 5 saturation stages s0→s4_full

acceptance.note: Full generation spec, manifest, prompts, and atlas contracts produced. Actual PNG files require image generation API execution (google-imagen-4 / openrouter-gpt-image). All 25 terrain sets × their variants are fully specified. Downstream art-qa can consume this manifest to validate generated images once produced.
